versions.version_description: This is all of the aspects of the song in one piece, so that nobody has to switch between 2 for the entire song.

Since no versions are published with the full songs chords, interludes and an accurate solo I decided to give it a shot. Slowed down the remastered version to 0.5 and broke down the solo note for note. Hope you enjoy and let me know if there is anything you think needs to be changed. No pride in this, just want to make sure everyone has access to an accurate version.
No Capo Version by my Guitar Teacher Johnathan.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Have You Ever Seen The Rain

content:
[Chords]
[ch]Amaj[/ch]
[ch]Dmaj[/ch]
[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Gmaj (can be open G chord or barred on 3rd fret)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj[/ch]
Fmaj (preferabbly barred version)[/tab]

Tuning: Standard

Strumming:
U=Up
D=Down

             D--U--D--U--U--D--U--
             1  +  2  +  3  4  +

(For Intro, on the second down strum, play Dsus4, then on the up stroke, switch back to Dmaj.)

(When it gets to 'Crazy Little thing called love', do 4 strums of Fmaj, 4 of G and then 
7 or 8 of the Dmaj.)

(When it goes to G C C G, play same strumming pattern for G, then two strums for C then 
final one for the last G.)

[Intro]
D/Dsus4 (x4)
D/Dsus4      D/Dsus4      D/Dsus4  
[tab]D/Dsus4                     [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
This thing   called love, I just   can't handle it,[/tab]
D/Dsus4      D/Dsus4        G           C       G
This thing   called love, I must   get round to it,
[tab]D/Dsus4          [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
I ain't ready,   Crazy Little Thing Called Love.[/tab]

[Verse]
D/Dsus4                   D/Dsus4
This thing  (This thing), called love (called love),
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
It cries (like a baby), In a cradle all night,[/tab]
D/Dsus4               D/Dsus4
It swings (Woo woo), It jives (Woo woo),
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
It shakes all over like a jellyfish,[/tab]
D/Dsus4
I kinda like It,
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Crazy Little Thing Called Love[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
There goes my ba-a-by, she knows how to rock and roll,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
She drives me cra-a-zy, she gives me hot 'n' cold fever!,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]
She leaves me in a cool cool sweat.[/tab]

[tab][Solo]
E|-----------------------------------------------------|
B|-----------------------------------------------------|
G|--------------------9-9-9-9-9-9----------------------|
D|----------------------------------7-7-5-4-0----------|
A|--5-3-0----------------------------------------------|
E|---------5-3-0---------------------------------------|[/tab]

(The song continues onwards using the formula of chords used earlier on) (D/Dsus4 - G - C C - G)
(For last bit where 'Crazy little thing called love is said over and over, just do F - G - D,
as it is done before.)
